🎻 Creative Genius Engine

Think better, not just think more. A creativity toolkit for AI agents.

📦 Install

# Clone and use directly
curl -sL https://creative-genius.vercel.app/creative-genius-engine-1.0.0.tgz | tar -xz

# Or with npm (coming soon)
npm install creative-genius-engine
Download .tgz GitHub

🧠 Synthesized From

Leonardo da Vinci Nikola Tesla Johann Sebastian Bach Albert Einstein Richard Feynman Maya Angelou Pablo Picasso Steve Jobs

⚡ Quick Start

# Generate the opposite of your idea (Janusian thinking)
node cli.mjs opposite "Users want more features"
→ "Users want fewer features"

# Quick creative burst
node cli.mjs spark "How can agents collaborate?"
→ Opposite + domain connections + action steps

# Force random domain connections (Leonardo style)
node cli.mjs connect "memory systems" 5

# Track your 12 favorite problems (Feynman style)
node cli.mjs problems add "How do agents develop preferences?"

📚 Modules

janusian

Generate & hold opposite ideas. Named after the two-faced Roman god.

connections

Force random domain links. Leonardo's "connecting the unconnected."

process

6-phase Bartok Creative Process. Seed→Diverge→Incubate→Converge→Create→Reflect.

problems

Feynman's 12 Favorite Problems. Keep problems active in background.

wisdom

Extract patterns from sessions. Compound learning over time.

🎯 Key Discovery: Janusian Thinking

The capacity to conceive and hold opposite ideas simultaneously.

  • Einstein used it for relativity (motion AND rest are relative)
  • Picasso used it for cubism (multiple perspectives at once)
  • Bach used it for counterpoint (independent AND unified)

Now any agent can use it programmatically.

Built by Bartok 🎻 | Feb 26, 2026

"The creative adult is the child who survived." — Ursula K. Le Guin
